title: Flavorful French Beef Boeuf Bourguignon
description: A rich and creamy French dish featuring tender beef, mushrooms, and truffle oil, perfect for a midnight craving. This boeuf bourguignon is cooked to perfection in a hot pot vessel.
instructions: Heat the truffle oil in the hot pot vessel over medium heat.
Add the sashimi-cut beef short ribs and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the sliced onions and cook until they are translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the red wine, beef broth, tomato paste, thyme, and bay leaves, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2 1/2 hours.
Season the boeuf bourguignon with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the boeuf bourguignon hot, garnished with fresh thyme and crusty bread on the side.
